title: CZ wants to make the U.S. the 'capital of crypto': State of Crypto
summary: The Binance founder shared his views on a variety of topics in an exclusive interview with CoinDesk earlier this month.

title: Samson Mow says bitcoin bottom is in despite skepticism from analysts
summary: The bitcoin advocate said his crypto bottom claim is based on the fact that the traditional four-year halving cycle has changed, although several analysts continue to expect further downside.

title: Michael Saylor teases more bitcoin buying even as Strategy stock continues to fall
summary: The crypto bull shrugged off market skepticism by sharing a chart of the company's $50 billion stash and teasing that they are going to need more data points.

title: SBI's $289 million Bitbank deal is symptomatic of Japan's crypto consolidation: Architect Partners
summary: The investment bank said the purchase of Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank is a bet on regulated scale as sweeping reforms reshape the country's digital asset market.

title: Crypto's next frontier isn't crypto, it's financing AI and robotics, Framework's Anderson says
summary: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries rather than just crypto-native speculation, Michael Anderson, the crypto venture firm's cofounder, said.
